tasks.label: C/C++: g++.exe build active file
args: "C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe" -c main.cpp -o main.o -std=c++20 && "C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe" -c functions.cpp -o functions.o -std=c++20 && "C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe" -c jsoncpp.cpp -o jsoncpp.o -std=c++20 && "C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe" main.o functions.o jsoncpp.o -o main.exe
tasks.detail: Build all source files for HW1 Problem2.
